infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SlipIn uses your location to show you nearby people.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SlipIn uses your location to show you nearby people.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SlipIn needs access to your photos to set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SlipIn needs camera access to take a profile photo.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow SlipIn to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SlipIn to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SlipIn to use your camera.
